_comment: TRUE POSITIVE — SP-700001: Entra ID Global Admin direkt zugewiesen (ohne PIM)
scenario: Attacker with compromised privileged account assigns Global Administrator role directly, bypassing PIM
why_tp: Global Administrator role assigned directly (no PIM activation event preceding it)
Initiating user is not an approved Identity Administrator
analyst_action: Immediately confirm if assignment was authorized via change ticket
Check attacker@contoso.com sign-in history for the last 24h
If unauthorized: remove the role assignment and initiate incident response
